name: Yelling At Cats: The Game
short_description: A short and silly horror game where you play as a cat with an owner experiencing Coprolalia and must find out what has made them so angry by staring at them long enough without being caught.
detailed_description:
They are having a terrible day. You are going to watch.

Based on a popular YouTube video titled "Yelling At Cats," Yelling At Cats: The Game is a tense, room-scale stealth game told entirely from the low-to-the-ground perspective of a house cat. Your Owner is stomping around the house, muttering to themselves after a long series of highly relatable, incredibly petty inconveniences. Your goal? Secretly observe them until the timer runs out.

Key Features:

  • True Feline Stealth: Navigate a suburban house from a cat's perspective. Use couches, tables, and doorways to break line of sight the moment the Owner's gaze swings your way.

  • Immersive 3D Audio: Featuring physically accurate sound propagation. Listen to the Owner's iconic voice lines vibrate through the floorboards, behind closed doors and wrap around corners. Your ears are your greatest weapon.

  • Tense Observation: You have to look at them to make progress, but if they see you, you only have a split-second grace period to scramble back into the shadows before your progress is wiped clean.

  • Dynamic Scares & Laughs: Survive the tension of being stalked, only to be rewarded with randomly generated, hilarious reasons for why your Owner was so mad in the first place!
